purpose: Source-inspection coverage for balanced-MoE retained throughput model surfaces.
read: DeepSeek and Qwen have real TorchTitan model/config surfaces. Kimi remains a missing training surface; route-shape ABI parity is not a throughput substitute.

deepseek_v4_flash_12layer.topology: 12 layers, 256 experts, top-k 6, DSv4 Flash MLA

qwen3_5_397b_a17b_reduced_8layer.topology: 8 layers, 512 experts, top-k 10 plus one shared expert

kimi_k2_6_reduced_6layer.topology: 6 layers, 384 experts, top-k 8 plus one shared expert, MLA, native hidden 7168 with 4096 fallback
kimi_k2_6_reduced_6layer.required_next_action: Add a real reduced Kimi TorchTitan training model/config surface, then run the 20-step no-helper versus top-8 helper ladder.
